scope: The exact merged ChemSpec catalogue containing the 118-element identity catalogue, the Li/Na/K water family, and 68 oxygen-reaction experiences. These include the existing main-group outcomes plus 51 transition-metal oxide outcomes generated from 27 periodic-group members, shared metallic-source families, normal-oxide stoichiometry families, selectable mixed-valence products, and covalent MO3, M2O7, and MO4 families.
method: Human chemist verification asserted by the project owner for the exact digest, together with deterministic schema validation, all 68 oxygen generalized-rule expansions, compact graph-automorphism reduction, transition-metal d-electron retention and Hund-state reconfiguration, structural kernel execution, electron conservation and electron-occupancy checks, and simulation-frame projection.
coverage_conclusion: The exact catalogue digest is approved for the representative theoretical oxygen outcomes and atom-level simulation operations it contains, including the transition-metal family cases and their selectable product alternatives.
limitation: Approval covers the closed theoretical models encoded by this digest. It does not imply laboratory procedure, quantitative kinetics, safety guidance, or products not explicitly represented by a reviewed catalogue outcome.
